abnormality of the larynx, arterial tortuosity leading to palpitations and increased risk of vascular events, joint hypermobility, gastrointestinal symptoms, headaches, fasciculations, paraparesis, abnormality of the knee, arthralgia, and dysautonomia

short stature with disproportionate body habitus, coarse facial features, skeletal deformities including kyphoscoliosis, elbow contractures, carpal tunnel syndrome, hearing loss, cardiac valve thickening, respiratory issues, and hernias
angiokeratoma cutaneum, cornea verticillata, hypohidrosis, acroparasthesis, arrhythmias, hypertension, left ventricular hypertrophy, kidney involvement, and male infertility

large vessel vasculitis causing inflammation and stenosis primarily affecting the aorta and its major branches, resulting in claudication or ischemia of extremities, heart failure due to reduced blood flow to the coronaries, and systemic manifestations such as fever, fatigue, weight loss, and night sweats
oral ulcers, neck mass or swelling, hoarseness, dysphagia, cervical adenopathy, cranial nerve palsies, and lung metastases
photosensitivity, bullae formation after sun exposure, blisters, scarring, abdominal pain, constipation, hemolytic anemia, and elevated aminolevulinic acid and porphobilinogen levels

demyelination predominantly involving distal muscles of lower legs and feet, pes cavus, hammer toes, foot drop, absent deep tendon reflexes, sensorineural hearing loss, intellectual disability, and metabolic acidosis
recurrent fevers accompanied by serositis, peritoneal inflammation, pleurisy, erysipelas-like skin rashes, hepatomegaly, splenomegaly, and ocular lesions

generalized joint hypermobility, chronic widespread musculoskeletal pain, instability, subluxations, soft tissue injuries, gastrointestinal problems, autonomic dysregulation, sleep disturbances, anxiety, depression, and Raynaud's phenomenon
